response.justification: Bogdan's resume shows extensive experience in software development across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, AI-agent infrastructure) with strong technical skills. However, his background lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, deep-learning workload optimization, or AI accelerator architectures, which are core to the Principal Performance Architect role. The resume also does not indicate any work with SIMD/MIMD architectures or GPU optimization, and his education/experience does not align with the required PhD/Master's/Bachelor's + extensive experience threshold for this principal-level role.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with diverse full-stack experience (web, mobile, embedded systems)
Proven ability to optimize performance in high-throughput systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests)
Published workshops and talks demonstrating technical communication and teaching skills
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design
No background in AI accelerator architectures, deep-learning workload optimization, or GPU architecture
Education and experience do not meet the required technical depth for a principal-level role in hardware/cloud infrastructure
